voices.name: Ellen - Serious, Direct and Confident
voices.description: Ellen - Calm female voice with international accent

voices.name: James - Husky, Engaging and Bold
voices.description: James - Husky & Engaging - A slightly husky and bassy voice with a standard American accent. Modulated, controlled, and direct and perfect for audiobooks, captivating narrations, or storytelling, or other professional voiceover work.

voices.name: Juniper - Grounded and Professional
voices.description: Juniper - A grounded female professional, great for podcasts or ConvoAI.

voices.name: Mark - Natural Conversations
voices.description: A casual, young-adult speaking in a natural manner. Perfect for Conversational AI.

voices.name: Arabella - Mysterious and Emotive
voices.description: Arabella - A young, mature female narrator with a mysterious and emotive tone, perfect for fantasy, romance, urban fantasy, and wellness.

voices.name: Jane - Professional Audiobook Reader
voices.description: Jane - Professional Audiobook Reader - Professional English audiobook narrator in her 50s with a nice tone and cadence. Great for narration, storytelling, or general content creation, like YouTube.

voices.name: Bradford - Expressive and Articulate
voices.description: Bradford - An adult British Male Storyteller. Expressive, articulate, and engaging!

voices.name: Xavier - Dominating, Metalic Announcer
voices.description: Gaming – Unreal Tonemanagement 2003 - The 'Unreal Tonemanagement 2003' voice, originally voiced by Christian Plasa, is a retro-futuristic announcer style inspired by classic arena shooters. With its sharp, metallic authority, it’s ideal for domination calls, game intros, and immersive content that channels high-tech tournament energy.

voices.name: Austin - Deep, Raspy and Authentic
voices.description: Austin - Good ol' Texas boy - Good ol' boy, goes to the state fair every year, low, deep gravelly voice, proud of his state, can get intimate with a fireside talk, but can get loud when he's drinkin' with the boys.  Served with a heapin' side of STRONG Texas accent and collard greens.

voices.name: Jarnathan - Confident and Versatile
voices.description: Jarnathan - warm, confident, versatile - A warm, smooth and versatile American man’s voice both expressive and dynamic. The voice exudes confidence, relatability and has a natural timber with subtle shifts in tone perfect for narration that reflects wonder, tension, reflection and optimism. Beyond narration, it has a wide range from quiet to shouting, dramatic to instructional. It should serve multiple purposes and be one of the widest emotionally ranging voices available.

voices.name: Kuon - Cheerful, Clear and Steady
voices.description: kuon - Acute female & fantastic voice.

voices.name: Blondie - Conversational
voices.description: A British woman with a warm, natural voice—perfect for relaxed, engaging conversations, storytelling, and friendly narration.

voices.name: Priyanka - Calm, Neutral and Relaxed
voices.description:
Priyanka Sogam - Late Night Radio (Neutral Accent) - A young female with a velvety, laid-back cadence, exuding late-night warmth and intimacy.

Priyanka is the sister of Monika Sogam, one of the most beloved voices on ElevenLabs.  

Priyanka's voice is smooth, deep, and effortlessly soothing, ideal for storytelling, reflective monologues, or engaging one-on-one conversations, audiobooks, meditation guides, and luxury brand advertising.

voices.name: Monika Sogam - Deep and Natural
voices.description: Monika Sogam - Indian English accent voice for social media videos and audiobooks

voices.name: Grimblewood Thornwhisker - Snarky Gnome & Magical Maintainer
voices.description: Professional British character voice - high-pitched, raspy gnome with snarky comedic timing and true emotional depth. Perfect for fantasy narration, audiobooks, and video games NPCs. Switches between grumpy humor and warm wisdom. Authentic British accent with unique gnomish personality. Clean, expressive vocal performance.

voices.name: Adeline - Feminine and Conversational
voices.description: Adeline - A conversational, feminine voice that is perfect for narration.

voices.name: Mark - Casual, Relaxed and Light
voices.description: Mark - ConvoAI

voices.name: Sam - Support Agent
voices.description: Sam - Support Agent & Audiobooks - A warm and clear middle-aged American voice ready to handle all your support needs.  Optimized for v3.  Perfect for Agents, IVR, Educational Training, and Audiobooks.

voices.name: Spuds Oxley - Wise and Approachable
voices.description: Grandpa Spuds Oxley - A friendly grandpa who knows how to enthrall his audience with tall tales and fun adventures.

voices.name: Eve - Authentic, Energetic and Happy
voices.description: Eve - Great for V3, conversation, energetic, happy

voices.name: Northern Terry
voices.description: Eccentric & husky character from the North of England. Perfect for games, animation or quirky conversations.

voices.name: Dr. Von - Quirky, Mad Scientist
voices.description: Dr. Von Fusion VF – Quirky Mad Scientist - Energetic, quirky voice ideal for eccentric characters and inventive narration.

voices.name: British Football Announcer
voices.description: Energetic, fast-paced, crisp British accent; rising intonation, dramatic pauses, thrilling delivery.

voices.name: Brock - Commanding and Loud Sergeant
voices.description: Drill Sergeant - Harsh, barking tone; clipped, commanding cadence; loud, relentless, and full of authority.

voices.name: Célian - Documentary Narrator
voices.description: Célian - A warm, clear, and engaging French male voice with a smooth, natural tone. Equally soothing and dynamic, it adapts seamlessly to storytelling, audiobooks, scientific explanations, reports, interviews, and promotional content. Its expressive yet balanced delivery captivates listeners, making complex ideas accessible while maintaining a professional and inviting presence.

voices.name: Nathan – Virtual Radio Host
voices.description: A dynamic and seasoned v3 ready voice for audiobooks, agents, Live call in radio shows and podcasts.

voices.name: Anika - Animated, Friendly and Engaging
voices.description: Anika - Animated and Friendly - Anika is a trusted friend - expressive, clear, and effortlessly engaging. Perfect for animated storytelling or tutorials, it brings an optimistic, authentic tone that connects with young listeners and makes every word resonate. Ideal for projects that need an empathetic, friendly touch.

voices.name: Viraj - Rich and Soft
voices.description: Viraj - Suspenseful and Engaging Narrator - Viraj’s voice brings depth and intrigue, perfect for suspense and horror storytelling. With a slow, deliberate pace and a rich, breathy tone, his delivery creates a haunting, immersive atmosphere. Ideal for chilling narratives, his booming presence draws listeners into a world of mystery and tension.

voices.name: Jack John - Conversational and Upbeat
voices.description: Jack John - Natural Customer Support Agent - A natural, conversational customer support agent voice. Early to Mid 30s American Male. Great at providing a confident and professional, yet conversational, natural, and friendly voice for AI agents. Trained on data reading out strings of numbers, letters, email addresses, and confirmation codes. Includes disfluencies and natural filler words in recording data for the most realistic, human like recording possible.

voices.name: Taksh - Calm, Serious and Smooth
voices.description: Taksh - Powerful & Commanding Voice - Ideal voice for divine storytelling, historical epics, and philosophical reflections, this voice carries a deep, commanding presence—rich in bass and authority, yet calm and deliberate. Perfect for epic narrations, mythology, and grand storytelling, it echoes wisdom and power. Every word feels profound, every sentence leaves an impact.

voices.name: Guadeloupe Merryweather - Emotional
voices.description:
Guadeloupe Merryweather - A Piratas's Voice! - 
My voice is like RUM - strong, intoxicating, and guaranteed to make you do stupid things! HAHAHAH!! With my Spanish-German tongue, rolling Rs, and habit of losing words when excited (¡PIENSA Guadeloupe, PIENSA!), I bring the perfect CHAOS to any proyecto!
Remember - you're not hiring a voice, you're hiring an AVENTURA! ¡AI AI AI!

voices.name: Horatius – Energetic Character Voice
voices.description: Horatius Brash  - Over the Top, Precocious and Self-Assured.  The Captain of your next explorers adventure or just being your favorite evil genius! A dashing quest or a dastardly plan - it's up to you!
